svg.title: ADK Agent with Vertex AI Architecture
svg.desc: Complete flow from GitHub Actions cron trigger and Developer through ADK Agent, Vertex AI Gemini, GCP APIs, BigQuery, Looker Studio, and Slack

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions cron trigger the ADK agent?')
sendPrompt('How does a developer interact with the ADK agent?')
sendPrompt('How does Workload Identity Federation work with Vertex AI?')
sendPrompt('What does the ADK root agent do?')
sendPrompt('What model does Vertex AI use in the ADK agent?')
sendPrompt('Which GCP APIs does the agent call?')
sendPrompt('What does the Excel VM inventory report contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the Slack notification look like?')
sendPrompt('How does Looker Studio connect to BigQuery?')
